text.title: Solo Utilization And Pipeline Dashboard Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Solo Utilization And Pipeline Dashboard output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

required.field: stable kebab-case slug used to reference this artefact downstream
single named accountable owner (handle / email / role-with-rotation)
the actual answer / chosen option / value produced
≥2 sentences; cites at least one input by name
input names with source paths or URLs
ISO-8601 date the artefact was last validated

forbidden.pattern: rationale that does not reference any input by name
inputs_used is empty AND decision is not 'no-op'
duplicate artefact_id within the same store

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim long prose fields to fit limits while preserving numeric claims, named tools, and citations.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "smoke-solo-utilization-and-pipeline-dashboard", "owner": "Maria Lopes", "decision": "raise floor rate from $125 to $140", "rationale": "Realised $/hr sustained $138 across three months while pipeline coverage held above 1.2x. Cites toggl-export-q1.csv and pipeline-ledger-2026-q1.md.", "inputs_used": ["toggl-export-q1.csv", "pipeline-ledger-2026-q1.md"], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: owner forbidden value; decision empty; inputs_used empty; version + last_reviewed missing.
